summary: Comprehensive research report on the latest agentic AI frameworks (as of June 2026) and specific, actionable improvements mapped to our KDP/Etsy multi-model pipeline. Covers 6 major improvement areas: LangGraph state machine orchestration, DSPy automatic prompt optimization, self-improving trace analysis, MCP tool protocol, model routing, and production guardrails. Each improvement includes what it is, why it matters, and exactly how to implement it in our existing system.
